name: Roger Humphries
abstract: Roger Humphries (born January 30, 1944) is an American jazz drummer. Born into a family of ten children in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, Humphries began playing drums at age four, and went professional at age 14.

about_quotes.speaker: Reggie Watkins
about_quotes.evidence: Roger Humphries, who is the great — he’s like the Godfather of jazz in Pittsburgh. He played with Horace Silver. He’s © Fillius Jazz Archive -8- an amazing drummer. So I’m getting just all this experience there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Reggie Watkins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, May 22, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: George Benson
about_quotes.evidence: Roger Humphries, the drummer, great drummer. We were rivals, in the sense that we were up-and-coming people...
